attributes.name: [NVIDIA GPU OTel] GPU idle during expected workload

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL),
    max_util = MAX(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL)
  BY Hostname, UUID, modelName
// Detects GPUs that are completely idle — may indicate a stuck job,
// misconfigured workload, or wasted resources
// Adjust threshold and alertDelay based on expected idle periods
| WHERE max_util < 1
| SORT Hostname ASC
